'''Robbie Beazley''' (born 18 March 1974) is an Australian former professional [[rugby league]] footballer. His position of choice was as a {{rlp|hk}}.

==Background==
Beazley was born in [[Dubbo]], [[New South Wales]], Australia.

While attending [[List of Government schools in New South Wales#D|Dubbo South High School]], Beazley played for the [[Australia national schoolboys rugby league team|Australian Schoolboys team]] in 1992.<ref>{{cite web|title=SportingPulse Homepage for Australian Secondary Schools Rugby League|url=http://www.sportingpulse.com/assoc_page.cgi?c=7-2130-0-0-0&sID=26424|accessdate=10 October 2008|work=SportingPulse|archive-date=31 January 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170131030043/http://websites.sportstg.com/assoc_page.cgi?c=7-2130-0-0-0&sID=26424|url-status=dead}}</ref>

==Playing career==
He played for the [[Penrith Panthers]] and [[Illawarra Steelers]] in Australia and [[London Broncos#1994–2005: Broncos and Super League|London Broncos]] in the [[Super League]].
